title: ChunkSchema
description: Schema for a single document or code chunk in RAG.

id.description: Unique identifier for the chunk (e.g., hash or file-line suffix).

filepath.description: Relative path of the source file.

type.description: The structural type of the chunked content.

name.description: Optional name of the code element (e.g., class name, function name).

start_line.description: 1-based starting line number in the source file.

end_line.description: 1-based ending line number in the source file.

content.description: The raw text or code content of the chunk.

tokens.description: Estimated token count of the content.
